title: No Capes
description: Hides all specified capes from your view.
body:
# No Capes!
This mod hides all specified capes from your client side view. My mod is available under [WTFPL](http://www.wtfpl.net/txt/copying/) license, which means anyone can do whatever they want with any part of it.


## Installation 
This mod supports only Fabric and Quilt. It can be installed on only client side.

## Usage
To use this mod, it is highly recommended you install [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu/) and [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config/). 
All capes are shown by default and you must disable the ones you wish to not see.
